testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.sse.DeviceStreamControllerTest

testcase.name: stream sends an immediate CONNECTED handshake event()
stream returns an SseEmitter with no server-side timeout()
stream isolates registrations across different devices()
stream is annotated with the SSE route and produces TEXT_EVENT_STREAM()
stream registers the emitter under the deviceId in SseEmitterRegistry()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:33.397+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-handshake totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.397+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.sse.DeviceStreamController : SSE stream opened: device=device-handshake 2026-05-02T23:50:33.397+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-no-timeout totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.397+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.sse.DeviceStreamController : SSE stream opened: device=device-no-timeout 2026-05-02T23:50:33.398+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-1 totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.398+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.sse.DeviceStreamController : SSE stream opened: device=device-1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.398+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-2 totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.398+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.sse.DeviceStreamController : SSE stream opened: device=device-2 2026-05-02T23:50:33.398+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-2 totalEmittersForDevice=2 2026-05-02T23:50:33.398+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.sse.DeviceStreamController : SSE stream opened: device=device-2 2026-05-02T23:50:33.399+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-abc totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.399+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.sse.DeviceStreamController : SSE stream opened: device=device-abc
